shot_type_and_framing: medium close-up of a black gift box centered vertically and horizontally within the frame, the box's lid is slightly off and placed to the top right, revealing a beige decorative ceramic plate with a gold ribbon tied around it, positioned flat inside the box, with a "Happy Diwali" card lying flat at the bottom right corner of the frame
camera_movement: slow gentle tilt downwards starting from the top of the box lid to focus on the ceramic plate and the greeting card
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel with a 50mm focal length style providing natural perspectives and shallow depth of field softly blurring the background while keeping the gift box and card in sharp focus
environment_description: a smooth, beige matte surface serves as the flat background under the black gift box and card, creating a warm and minimalistic setting with neutral tones
subject_description: a rectangular beige ceramic decorative plate with carved scalloped edges, adorned with a gold leaf motif, wrapped neatly with a gold satin ribbon tied in a bow, placed inside a matte black rectangular box with a slightly textured lid set aside, accompanied by a beige card with an embossed floral mandala design and the words 'HAPPY DIWALI' centered on it
motion_behavior: natural, steady, slow tilting movement without abrupt changes, simulating real camera handling
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, premium, clean, and filmic with an emphasis on elegance and simplicity
